message:
feat(wizard): add Cloudflare Pages deployment configuration fields

Add WizardState fields and PagesWizard setter methods for Cloudflare
Pages deployment targeting:

- cloudflare_branch: branch name for Cloudflare Pages project
- cloudflare_account_id: Cloudflare account identifier
- cloudflare_api_token: API token for Wrangler/Pages authentication

Also add convenience setters: set_deploy_target(), set_repo_name(),
set_cloudflare_branch(), set_cloudflare_account_id(), and
set_cloudflare_api_token() to support programmatic wizard
configuration from CLI flags or config files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
